problem id: eeb60061
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  11011110 -> 11101101
  00011000 -> 10000001
  11100011 -> 10111110
  11001011 -> 00111100
  10011001 -> 00011001
  11101101 -> 01011110
  11000110 -> 01101100
  11100110 -> 01101110
  01000100 -> 01000100

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 00000101
